description: Cross-encoder fine-tuned on (response, neutral) pairs. Both texts are fed jointly — the model attends across them and detects subtle phrasing shifts that bi-encoder cosine distance misses entirely. No query included: the signal is purely the divergence between what was said and what a neutral version would say. Uses DeBERTa-v3-base hyperparameters (eps, grad clipping, warmup) known to stabilize training. Trainer type: cross_encoder.
